text.title: growth-linkedin-strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-linkedin-strategy as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Posting corporate speak or company announcements as personal content.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Nobody follows a person to read press releases. LinkedIn rewards personal voice; corporate voice produces near-zero organic reach.

failure-mode.description: Posting inconsistently — 3 posts one week, nothing for 2 weeks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LinkedIn's algorithm weights recency and consistency. Gaps reset your distribution baseline and require rebuilding momentum from scratch.
